texto: He felt that every sorrow was less than that which separation must produce
autor: and that to share adversity with her was greater happiness than the enjoyment prosperity apart from her.
explicacao: Orientação direta de and that to share adversity with her was greater happiness than the enjoyment prosperity apart from her. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “He felt that every sorrow was less than that which separation must produce” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, mary-wollstonecraft-shelley, lodore, útil em momentos de lodore.
